videoDetails.title: How I Found Resilience as My Life Fell Apart | Jane Marie Chen | TED
videoDetails.shortDescription:
Entrepreneur and TED Fellow Jane Marie Chen started a company that created a low-cost portable incubator for premature babies in underserved communities, with the goal of saving more than one million babies around the world. But when a major setback at the company led to burnout, she had to make a choice. In this powerful talk, she shares what happened next — and how it taught her the secret to resilience. (Recorded at TEDNext 2025 on November 9, 2025)
